name: MAXROTEC Co., Ltd.
summary: Maxrotec Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells gantry robot systems to car and machine manufacturers in Korea. It also offers parallel kinematics machines; metal 3D printers; engine cylinder blocks and heads; and conveyors, as well as washing and air blow units. The company's products are also used in automobile, aerospace, shipbuilding, and other applications. Maxrotec Co., Ltd. was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Daegu, South Korea.
